---
name: Trust claim or docs issue
about: Report unclear, stale, or overbroad trust-claim language
title: "[trust-docs] "
labels: documentation, trust-surface
assignees: ""
---

## Claim Or Document

Link the document, section, receipt path, proof package, or reviewer workflow.

## Concern

- [ ] Positive support claim is unclear
- [ ] Required evidence is unclear
- [ ] Verification command is missing or stale
- [ ] Known limitation is missing or imprecise
- [ ] Language risks overclaiming

## Suggested Correction

Describe the narrower or clearer wording.

## Boundary Check

- [ ] This issue is metadata-only
- [ ] This issue does not include private evidence, secrets, raw logs, raw
      prompts, raw model output, or raw target data
- [ ] This issue does not request autonomous execution, live integration, or
      expanded runtime behavior
